causalAutopsy.notes: The headless-home requirement was known (claude auth login stores tokens only; interactive first-launch needs the onboarding flags) but the pin/swap launch paths never enforced it. The gap sat latent until the proactive swap moved ~8 interactive sessions onto headless-enrolled homes at once (2026-06-09, topic 20905).
